Id1.text: Ayam penyet is made from squeezed or squashed chicken served with sambal and is a popular dish in Java, Malaysia.

Id2.text: Ayam penyet's main ingredients are squeezed or smashed fried chicken served with sambal. It is a popular dish in Malaysia and also found in Java.
